statusLine.command: input=$(cat); agent=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.agent.name // "Claude"' 2>/dev/null); cwd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.worktree.name // .worktree.branch // .workspace.project_dir // .workspace.current_dir // .cwd // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$cwd" ] || cwd=unknown; model=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // empty' 2>/dev/null); remaining=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r 'if .context_window.remaining_percentage == null then "" else (.context_window.remaining_percentage | floor | tostring) end' 2>/dev/null); used=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r 'if .context_window.used_percentage == null then "" else (.context_window.used_percentage | floor | tostring) end' 2>/dev/null); tokens_used=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.tokens_used // empty' 2>/dev/null); tokens_limit=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.tokens_limit // empty' 2>/dev/null); vim_mode=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.vim.mode // empty' 2>/dev/null); git_dir=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .workspace.project_dir // .cwd // empty' 2>/dev/null); branch=''; [ -n "$git_dir" ] && branch=$(git -C "$git_dir" symbolic-ref --short -q HEAD 2>/dev/null || git -C "$git_dir" rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); ctx_color='2'; if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then if [ "$remaining" -le 15 ] 2>/dev/null; then ctx_color='1;31'; elif [ "$remaining" -le 35 ] 2>/dev/null; then ctx_color='38;5;214'; else ctx_color='1;32'; fi; fi; bar=''; bar_used="$used"; [ -z "$bar_used" ] && [ -n "$remaining" ] && bar_used=$((100 - remaining)); if [ -n "$bar_used" ]; then filled=$(( (bar_used + 5) / 10 )); [ "$filled" -gt 10 ] && filled=10; [ "$filled" -lt 0 ] && filled=0; i=0; while [ $i -lt $filled ]; do bar="${bar}█"; i=$((i+1)); done; i=$filled; while [ $i -lt 10 ]; do bar="${bar}░"; i=$((i+1)); done; fi; fmt_tok(){ t=$1; if [ "$t" -ge 1000000 ] 2>/dev/null; then awk -v n="$t" 'BEGIN{printf "%.1fM", n/1000000}'; elif [ "$t" -ge 1000 ] 2>/dev/null; then awk -v n="$t" 'BEGIN{printf "%.0fk", n/1000}'; else printf '%s' "$t"; fi; }; printf '\033[2m◦ \033[0m'; printf '\033[1;36m%s\033[0m' "$agent"; if [ -n "$model" ] && [ "$model" != "$agent" ]; then printf ' \033[2m·\033[0m \033[2m%s\033[0m' "$model"; fi; printf ' \033[2m·\033[0m \033[1;33m%s\033[0m' "$cwd"; if [ -n "$branch" ]; then printf '\033[2m:%s\033[0m' "$branch"; fi; if [ -n "$bar" ]; then printf ' \033[2m·\033[0m \033[2m[\033[0m\033[%sm%s\033[0m\033[2m]\033[0m' "$ctx_color" "$bar"; if [ -n "$tokens_used" ] && [ -n "$tokens_limit" ]; then printf ' \033[%sm%s\033[0m\033[2m/%s\033[0m' "$ctx_color" "$(fmt_tok "$tokens_used")" "$(fmt_tok "$tokens_limit")"; elif [ -n "$remaining" ]; then printf ' \033[%sm%s%%\033[0m\033[2m left\033[0m' "$ctx_color" "$remaining"; else printf ' \033[%sm%s%%\033[0m\033[2m used\033[0m' "$ctx_color" "$used"; fi; fi; if [ -n "$vim_mode" ]; then printf ' \033[2m·\033[0m \033[2m%s\033[0m' "$vim_mode"; fi
